Alias.description: Name of the custom output target. You must use this name to refer to the output target in the data processing rules

ProjectId.description: Log project ID for storing processed logs

ProjectName.description: Log project name for storing processed logs

Region.description: Region of the log topic for storing processed logs

TopicId.description: Log topic ID for storing processed logs

TopicName.description: Log topic name for storing processed logs

description: The data processing task cleanses, transforms, and distributes log data in the log service, processing data from the source log topic and outputting it to the target log topic

CreateTime.description: Creation time of the data processing task

DSLType.description: Syntax type of the processing rule. Fixed as NORMAL

Description.description: Brief description of the data processing task. Does not support <>, ', \, or \\. Length: 0–64 characters

ETLStatus.description: Task scheduling status. WAITING: Preparing. RUNNING: Running. STOPPING: Stopping. STOPPED: Stopped. RESTARTING: Restarting

Enable.description: Whether the data processing task is enabled. true: Enabled. false: Disabled

FromTime.description: The processing start time of the data processing task, in seconds as a Unix timestamp

LastEnableTime.description: The most recent activation time of the data processing task

ModifyTime.description: Modification time of the data processing task

ProjectId.description: Log project ID to which the data processing task belongs

ProjectName.description: Log project name to which the data processing task belongs

Script.description: Processing rule script used by the data processing task

SourceTopicId.description: Source log topic ID of the data processing task

SourceTopicName.description: Source log topic name of the data processing task

TaskType.description: Type of the data processing task. Fixed as Resident

ToTime.description: The processing end time of the data processing task, in seconds as a Unix timestamp
